_metadata.notes: This visa is for individuals who want to study in the UK at a licensed student sponsor (school, college or university).

cas_offer.description: Must have unconditional offer and CAS from licensed student sponsor
cas_offer.details: You must have an unconditional offer from a licensed UK student sponsor and receive a CAS reference number.

english_language.description: Must meet English language requirements at CEFR level B1 (or higher for degree level)
english_language.details: You must demonstrate English language proficiency at CEFR level B1 for below degree level, or B2 for degree level study.

maintenance.description: Must have sufficient funds for course fees and living costs
maintenance.details: You must show sufficient funds for course fees plus living costs: £1,334/month (London) or £1,023/month (outside London) for up to 9 months.

academic_progression.description: Course must represent academic progression from previous study (if applicable)
academic_progression.details: Your new course must represent academic progression from your previous study, unless you are applying for your first UK study visa.

genuine_student.description: Must be a genuine student intending to study and leave UK after studies
genuine_student.details: You must be a genuine student who intends to study and leave the UK when your visa expires, unless switching to another visa.

degree_level.description: Students studying at degree level can work up to 20 hours per week during term time and full-time during vacations.

below_degree.description: Students studying below degree level can work up to 10 hours per week during term time and full-time during vacations.

prohibited_activities: Doctor/dentist in training (unless on specific course)
